data.title: Horse-themed cryptos surge before Lunar New Year, with MEME HORSE up by 2% at $6.3 million market cap, and FKH up by 3% at $232,400 valuation.
data.description: Horse-themed cryptocurrencies surged in anticipation of the Lunar New Year, marking the start of the Year of the Fire Horse. The MEME HORSE (MHORSE) token, based on the BNB Chain (CRYPTO: BNB), saw a rise of over 2% in the past day, with a current market capitalization of $6.3 million. Another horse-themed token, Flying Ketamine Horse (FKH), based on Solana (CRYPTO: SOL), increased by nearly 3% compared to the day before, holding a market value of $232,400. This information was provided by CoinGecko. Visit Benzinga.com for the complete article.

data.title: Crypto funds record 4th consecutive week of outflows totaling $173M as BTC falls below $70K, with XRP and Solana showing gains.
data.description: Last week, crypto funds experienced outflows amounting to $173 million as both Bitcoin and Ether witnessed a decline in value. However, XRP and Solana demonstrated a contrarian pattern by showing gains amidst the overall market trend.

data.title: Dunkin’ Joy in Childhood Foundation donates $1 million to Feeding America to aid food banks nationwide.
data.description: In Boston, the Dunkin’ Joy in Childhood Foundation revealed a generous $1 million grant allocated to Feeding America, the largest hunger-relief organization in the U.S. This grant aims to aid families battling hunger nationwide by providing essential food supplies. The funding will be channeled to various local Feeding America partner food banks to enhance their capacity in addressing the escalating demand for assistance and aiding individuals facing food insecurity. The Dunkin’ Joy in Childhood Foundation is dedicated to spreading joy and making a positive impact in communities.

data.title: A tax break championed by Trump saved horse racing as owners invested $1.5 billion on racehorses last year, up from 2024.
data.description: Last year, owners collectively invested close to $1.5 billion in racehorses, marking a substantial rise from the previous year. This notable increase can be attributed to a recent tax provision that enables owners to instantly deduct the entire purchase cost of racehorses.

data.title: Resecurity showcases AI-powered cybersecurity solutions at AI Everything MEA Egypt 2026, a prestigious event with government support.
data.description: Resecurity, an American cybersecurity and intelligence firm known for safeguarding Fortune 100 firms and government entities globally, participated in AI Everything MEA Egypt 2026, a prominent technology and innovation event in the region. This showcase was conducted with the support of President Abdel-Fattah El-Sisi and organized by the Ministry of Communications and Information Technology (MCIT) Egypt, in collaboration with the Information Techno.

data.title: Renowned economist Mohamed El-Erian warns as China's US Treasury share hits 15-year low at 7%, dropping from 28% peak. China's holdings now at $682.6 billion, lowest since 2008.
data.description: Renowned economist Mohamed El-Erian has highlighted a significant shift in global finance, noting China's U.S. Treasury market share fell to a 15-year low, only representing 7% of total holdings compared to its 28% peak 15 years ago. China's holdings have dropped to approximately $682.6 billion, the lowest since 2008, raising concerns about future demand for American debt. El-Erian emphasized the decline amid a steady increase in new U.S. government securities issuance. The data from the Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis shows a substantial change in 10-year Treasury yields over 15 years, reflecting the evolving dynamics in global finance.
